message:
feat(fp-columnar): add describe/combine/apply_float/hist_counts parity (frankenpandas-6goz)

Four more Column methods:

- describe() — returns the pandas-ordered vec of (count, mean, std,
  min, 25%, 50%, 75%, max). Non-numeric columns return TypeError.
  std uses sample variance (ddof=1) and is Null(NaN) for n < 2.
- combine(other, func, fill) — element-wise binary combine using
  `fill` when either input is missing; length mismatch returns
  LengthMismatch. Result dtype is inferred.
- apply_float(func) — numeric-only `pd.Series.apply` shortcut: map
  f64 -> f64 over non-missing values, propagating nulls. NaN results
  are normalized to Null(NaN). Result dtype Float64.
- hist_counts(bins) — equal-width histogram counts over non-missing
  numeric values. Constant columns collapse into the first bin;
  empty / bins=0 yield empty Vec; last bin is inclusive on both
  sides.

Co-lands frankenpandas-dsie (combine), la79 (apply_float),
csx5 (hist_counts).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
